email.description: Email of the company signatory who is authorized to accept our [Terms of Service](https://flows.gusto.com/terms) and migration decision. You can retrieve the signatory email from the `GET /v/1/companies/{company_id}/signatories` endpoint.

ip_address.description: The IP address of the signatory who viewed and accepted the Terms of Service.

external_user_id.description: The signatory's user ID on your platform.
